details.reasoning: Comprehensive and correct implementation of Top-A sampling. All requirements met: (1) top_a parameter added to SamplingParams with default 0.0, validation range [0.0, 1.0], and proper docstring; (2) filtering logic correctly implemented in multiple samplers (model_executor, v1, TPU) - computes max probability, masks tokens below top_a*max_prob, fills with -inf for downstream softmax renormalization; (3) top_a properly threaded through all intermediate structures (OpenAI protocol, SamplingTensors, SamplingMetadata, input batches, TPU metadata); (4) well-documented with docstrings; (5) syntactically valid Python following vLLM conventions. Minor issue: inconsistent use of in-place unsqueeze_ in model_executor/layers/sampler.py vs non-in-place unsqueeze in v1 implementations - stylistic inconsistency that doesn't affect correctness. Spec decode properly marked as unsupported with top_a.
